debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  contrapose!; rintro ⟨hb, rfl⟩; simp [Exp.eval]
  induction w generalizing args with
  | zero => match args with | ⟨#[], _⟩ => simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]; norm_num
  | succ w ih =>
    obtain ⟨args, b, rfl⟩ := Vector.exists_snoc args
    unfold assert_bits at hb; simp [Vector.all_snoc] at hb
    have hb_b : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases (beq_iff_eq.1 hb.2) with h|h <;> simp [h]
    unfold bits2num Vector.foldl at *; simp [Array.foldl_push] at *
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_add _ _) (Nat.add_le_add_left (ZMod.val_mul _ _) _))
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.add_le_add hb_b (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (ih _ hb.1))))
    rw [Nat.mul_sub, Nat.mul_one, ←Nat.pow_succ]; omega
